title: narcissus linnaeanus subsp. dubius
intro: Narcissus linnaeanus subsp. dubius, also known as the lesser jonquil or winter aconite, is a type of plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a cardiac and respiratory stimulant, as well as its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant are thought to include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Narcissus linnaeanus subsp. dubius can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
